summary: Iteration 5 testing covering all 9 items: settings shape, persona language, matrix method (gap_analysis), local provider plumbing, JSON-mode hint, UI-language toggle (id<->en), attribution badge, matrix dropdown + MD/CSV export, and regression of iter3/iter4. Backend: 11/11 new pytest cases PASS in 42.7s; regression iter3+iter4 18/18 PASS in 70.4s. Frontend: settings page renders all new sections; uilang-en-btn switches Settings page + home page to English (Lima Pilar -> Five Pillars), uilang-id-btn reverts. Reader shows summary-attribution with attribution-model='gemini-3-flash-preview' and attribution-persona='akademisi_ketat'. Matrix method dropdown selects gap_analysis, headers render Indonesian labels (Kesenjangan, Yang Sudah Diketahui, Mengapa Belum Terpecahkan, Peluang), MD (6.5KB) and CSV (5.2KB) exports download with row title + cell values + excerpts. ui_language reverted to 'id' after test.

settings_shape.details: GET /api/settings returns output_language ('en' after PUT, default 'en'), ui_language ('id' default), local_endpoint, local_model, local_api_key_masked, has_local, matrix_methods (5 entries). PUT persists each field; local_api_key is masked on GET (xyz12345abc -> xyz1***5abc).

persona_language_unit.details: Unit-level: persona_prefix({output_language:'id'}) contains 'Bahasa Indonesia'; output_language:'en' contains 'English'. (Endpoint round-trip skipped to cap LLM spend — covered by sanity test which verified summary still returns model_used+persona_used.)

matrix_method_param.details: POST /api/projects/{pid}/matrix {method:'gap_analysis', refresh:true} returns fields=['what_is_known','gap_identified','why_unresolved','opportunity']. Second call without refresh returned in <10s (cache hit). matrix_cache MongoDB docs now contain 'method':'gap_analysis' field.

local_provider_plumbing.details: split_provider_model('llama3.1:8b', settings={local_endpoint,...,local_model:'llama3.1:8b'}) -> ('local','llama3.1:8b'). PUT settings with local_endpoint -> has_local=true and available_models includes {provider:'local', id:'llama3.1:8b'}. POST /summarize?model=llama3.1:8b -> 502 (network failure routed via OpenAI-compatible path).

json_mode_hint.details: Patched _new_chat to return a fake chat with with_response_format; calling generate(want_json=True) invokes chat.with_response_format({'type':'json_object'}) — captured in monkeypatch. Local path passes response_format={'type':'json_object'} to AsyncOpenAI.chat.completions.create (verified in source).

frontend_settings_sections.details: settings-uilang-section, settings-outlang-section, settings-local-section all rendered. uilang-en-btn / uilang-id-btn / outlang-en-btn / outlang-id-btn / local-endpoint-input / local-model-input / local-api-key-input all selectable.

frontend_ui_language_toggle.details: Click uilang-en-btn -> Settings heading 'Settings', Back button 'Back'. Navigate to '/' -> Home shows 'Five Pillars' (English). Click uilang-id-btn -> heading 'Pengaturan'. Navigate to '/' -> 'Lima Pilar' (Indonesian).

frontend_attribution_badge.details: Reader dual-panel page has summary-attribution containing attribution-model ('gemini-3-flash-preview') and attribution-persona ('akademisi_ketat').

frontend_matrix_dropdown_and_export.details: matrix-method-select opens, matrix-method-option-gap_analysis selectable. Matrix built and headers in Indonesian (ui=id): 'Jurnal | Yang Sudah Diketahui | Kesenjangan | Mengapa Belum Terpecahkan | Peluang'. matrix-export-md triggered download (6597B .md, contains Journal header, table separator, multiple pipe-separated rows). matrix-export-csv triggered download (5282B .csv, 4 lines = header + 3 rows, includes journal/value/excerpt/page columns).

regression_iter3_iter4.details: tests/test_iteration3.py + tests/test_iteration4_llmjson.py: 18/18 PASS in 70.4s. matrix_cache schema change did not break old tests.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py:get_settings — local_api_key_masked only set when local_api_key != 'ollama'. Slightly clever guard; documented in code via the ternary. Fine.
server.py:build_matrix — refresh:true bypasses cache and re-runs the LLM. Cache key is now {document_id, method}, which correctly causes a different method to skip the legacy cache. Good.
matrix_service.extract_row — when LLM returns a non-dict (e.g. list), data is coerced to {} so every cell becomes 'tidak disebutkan'. Safe failure mode.

llm.py:_local_generate — uses temperature=0.2 and response_format={'type':'json_object'} when want_json=True. Good. api_key defaults to 'ollama' if user did not set one — matches Ollama's default behaviour.
llm.persona_prefix — appends output_language instruction AFTER the persona prompt, so the language directive wins. Good ordering.
Minor: i18n.js dictionary is duplicated id/en — fine for now, but extracting to per-key constant pairs would shrink the file when it grows beyond ~200 keys.

Minor: exportMatrix.matrixToCsv generates header with 4x columns (value + excerpt + page per field) but only labels the first set via fieldLabel — the excerpt/page columns appear as raw 'what_is_known__excerpt' in the header. Acceptable for a power-user CSV; could be improved with labelled suffixes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (settings i18n, attribution badge, matrix dropdown, MD+CSV export all PASS)

seed_data_creation: Module-scoped pytest fixture creates 'TEST_iter5' project + uploads a synthetic PyMuPDF PDF (Abstract/Objective/Methods/Results/Conclusion) and waits for status=ready. Teardown deletes project. Local endpoint cleared after plumbing test. UI tests reused existing 'testing 1' project (doc id dcacf8f8-... 'Adaptability of current keystroke...'). ui_language reset to 'id' at end of UI run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter5 features verified end-to-end. The plumbing test for local provider deliberately hits http://example.invalid/v1 and expects 5xx — leaves settings cleared. matrix_cache documents now carry a 'method' field; legacy docs without it are still accepted by /matrix (they just get treated as default-method cache and will be overwritten on next refresh). For future LLM-spend-light tests reuse the fake _new_chat monkeypatch pattern in TestJsonModeHint.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
